emails.subject: Montana Power #563929
emails.body: Montana Power #563929 I have a question about how this deal is entered. It is a 24 hour deal against an index. Shouldn't it be split out and priced against the individual on peak, off peak and Sunday index? Thanks!

emails.subject: Re: Montana Power #563929
emails.body: Re: Montana Power #563929 You're right Mike Driscoll entered this incorrectly, so I killed deal 563929 and simply added three new legs to the existing deal they were trying to extend. Deal number 476578 now has legs 4, 5, and 6 to extend the deal under the same terms through April. Please let me know if this doesn't show up correctly for some reason. Thanks, Kate From: Sharen Cason 03/29/2001 07:31 AM
